name: haejwo
description: 해줘 — "just handle it." Cold-start plugin for Claude Code and Codex: the user writes the ask, the host plans and delegates across model tiers, a different vendor's model reviews when available, and a PreToolUse gate keeps expensive judgment from becoming cheap execution. Zero workflow commands; commands are settings only.

interface.shortDescription: 해줘 — just handle it; the models work it out among themselves
